queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of having no checking account status on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default reduction associated with critical or alternative existing credit histories in consumer lending portfolios.
Empirical analysis of education loan purposes as credit risk drivers and their contribution to elevated default probabilities.
